items.title: Mira Murati steps back into the spotlight, carefully
items.summary: In the current environment, remaining heads down has diminishing returns; at some point, you have to make some noise just to remind the market you exist.

items.title: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic’s Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI’s returns
items.summary: Anthropic has been growing at a breakneck pace. The company announced that annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. That trajectory faces a real test, though.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，Claude 生态持续扩展。

items.title: Airbnb’s Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab
